programme.title: What If: Planet Earth
programme.sub-title: Home is where the heart is
programme.desc: Journey through the meaning of home, from cozy spaces to the emotional connections that make us feel truly at home, no matter where we are.

programme.title: How to Survive
programme.desc: Explore survival tactics for the most extreme scenarios in space, from malfunctioning spacesuits to surviving a black hole or life on Mars!

programme.title: How to Survive
programme.sub-title: Hidden Dangers: Pools, Germs, and Deadly Blooms
programme.desc: Uncover the hidden dangers lurking in everyday places, from contaminated pools to harmful algal blooms. Stay safe and informed!

programme.title: How to Survive
programme.desc: Stay safe and informed as we explore survival tips for intense situations, from surviving a punch by Mike Tyson to managing sleep paralysis and staying awake while driving!

programme.title: What If: Chase Dies in Space
programme.sub-title: What If You Spent a Nanosecond in a Black Hole?
programme.desc: What would the outcome be if you took a leap of faith straight into a black hole? Today, I’m taking you on a journey into the heart of darkness—just one nanosecond inside a black hole.

programme.title: What If: Planet Earth
programme.desc: Imagine a world split in half! Dive into scenarios where planets, moons, and entire systems are halved. What survives?

programme.title: What If: Body
programme.sub-title: Weird Bodies: From Endless Growth to Unexpected Pregnancies
programme.desc: Delve into bizarre biological phenomena, from bodies that never stop growing to the strangest pregnancy surprises!

programme.title: What If: Best Of
programme.sub-title: Dip Your Feet In: The World's Most Dangerous Pools
programme.desc: Take a plunge into the world’s most dangerous pools, from volcanic hot springs to breathtaking infinity edges!

programme.title: What If: Best Of
programme.sub-title: Eating Contest: The Strangest and Most Dangerous Foods
programme.desc: Explore the world of extreme eating, featuring bizarre and perilous delicacies that challenge even the bravest foodies!

programme.title: What If: Discussed
programme.desc: Do you drink energy drinks? Do you drink them everyday? Do you drink multiple ones everyday? Then you just might be addicted to energy drinks

programme.title: What If: Planet Earth
programme.sub-title: Everything Blue: Earth’s Frozen and Fiery Extremes
programme.desc: Venture into Earth's icy and fiery extremes! Explore how life adapts in places where everything seems impossibly blue.

programme.title: What If: Planet Earth
programme.sub-title: The Aftermath: What Happens After Extinction
programme.desc: Explore the future of Earth post-extinction. What emerges in the wake of life's disappearance? Discover the aftermath!

programme.sub-title: Down to Earth: What Shouldn't Exist on Earth
programme.desc: Uncover phenomena that defy explanation! Explore mysterious objects and anomalies that shouldn’t exist on Earth.

programme.desc: Discover innovations replacing traditional methods in energy, medicine, and technology. See what the future holds with 'The Replacements'!

programme.title: What If: Technology
programme.desc: Explore the groundbreaking innovations that are transforming our world, from AI to space exploration, and the future of human progress!

programme.title: What If: Technology
programme.sub-title: Intelligent Life: Psychic Superintelligence and Global Transformations
programme.desc: Delve into the concept of psychic superintelligence and how it could spark global transformations. What happens when intelligence evolves beyond human limits?

programme.sub-title: Have We Already Made First Contact?
programme.desc: For over half a century, we've searched for radio signals from extraterrestrial civilizations. Are they ignoring us? Or have aliens already made contact without us knowing it?

programme.desc: Travel through history and explore pivotal moments that shaped our world. What would you change if you could go back in time?

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Apple Dumplin' wants to help Strawberry & her Friends with the baking. But Dumplin's just a little too little to be much help. In fact, she ends up making a pretty big mess of things.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: At the urging of Honey Pie Pony, Strawberry & Friends decide to put on a Cooking Show. Ginger Snap invents a version of TV, which she calls Berryvision, to broadcast the show all over Strawberryland.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: All of Berry Bitty City is gathered around to watch the last snowberrykin melt. As the last bit of snow forms a puddle, a cheer goes up, spring is here! It's now time for the annual BerryFest. But with Princess Berrykin out of town on business, who will be the BerryFest Princess and preside over the festival?! Everyone is abuzz with how to go about choosing the Princess and what her duties will be. Postmaster Bee declares the only fair way to go about it is to hold an election. Everyone agrees.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry opens her front door to a throng of Berrykins all cheering for the new BerryFest Princess. She is appreciative of their admiration but unsure of exactly what her duties entail. In response the Berrykins bombard her with her duties - major to miniscule. One Berrykin sums it up by telling her she's responsible for presiding over all the activities of the BerryFest to make it the best.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.sub-title: Nothing To Fear But Berries Themselves
programme.desc: Overhearing Blueberry reading a story to the baby Berrykins about the scary Galumphalot, Orange is uncharacteristically shaken. She determines she doesn't want anything scary around her, just relaxation. But while the girls are having a hair-styling party at Lemon's salon, a malfunction at the BerryWorks causes the whole town to go dark. And Orange begins to get really anxious.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.sub-title: Where, Oh, Where Has Our Blueberry Gone?
programme.desc: Blueberry has become obsessed with the mystery book detective heroine, Patti Persimmon. She decorates her store with Patti posters and rearranges her shelves to make room for all the Patti books she's ordered. Blueberry begins to neglect outings with her friends and even goes so far as to dress like her idol just to emulate her. She then starts looking for cases to solve around town.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: While in the midst of a cake decorating demonstration at the café, the girls are uncharacteristically interrupted by an excited Princess Berrykin. She announces the Berrykins have decided to revive the old tradition of the Berry Bitty Buggy Derby. While the girls enthusiastically recount the stories they've heard about it and ask the Princess questions, Blueberry, carrying enough books to block her view, comes through the door and unknowingly interrupts the Princess.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: It's time again for the Dance-Off between the Big Bitty City Dance Team and the Berry Bitty City Dancers. Plum is stressed out and frazzled because she desperately wants to win. And the Big Bitty City Dancers are a force to be reckoned with. They are elegant and beautifully synchronized. Plum shows the girls a maze of dance steps that she's choreographed in the hopes of creating a winning piece. The problem is, the contest is only 1 week away!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Raspberry is distraught when she suspects her friends have copied her design on her lantern for the "Glimmerberry Gathering".

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: While sipping cider in Strawberry's café, the girls muse about how they cannot wait for winter to arrive. They list the various traditions they love about the season but the one they all agree on is the Glimmerberry Ball. Strawberry mentions that she doesn't think the café can hold the party this year because of how the town has grown. The girls decide to split up and search for a new location.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Lemon is ecstatic. She races out of her salon and goes around to the other girls' houses proclaiming that she "did it!" and beckoning them to join her. They follow her back and are completely dazzled by her newest creation - Glamicures. They are brightly colored, jeweled manicures with tiny microchips inside that play songs when the wearer moves her hand. Each girl lines up to receive her new glamicure and soon there is a cacophony of color and sound.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: With all the Baby Berrykins running around Berry Bitty City, Princess Berrykin decides to build a Day Care Center and playground. But she's worried because it's dull-looking - all grey metal and brown wood. She asks Strawberry whom might be good to help her out. And two names immediately come to her mind - Lemon and Raspberry! The Princess confesses she's always admired their sense of design and style.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: After returning to the café after a walk with her pets, Strawberry is met by Mr. Longface. He's been waiting for her so that they can get started making treats and decorating for Sadiebug's and Kadiebug's party that afternoon. But Custard and Pupcake have enjoyed their time outside so much that they want to continue playing.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Finding she has some free time one morning, Strawberry visits Berrykin Bloom who is filled with excitement over his new crop of Berry Bitty fruits and vegetables his garden has never grown so much produce! He can't wait to share his new crop (the perfect bitty size) with Berry Bitty City, so Strawberry volunteers to help him transport the produce to Orange's General Store.

programme.title: Workin' Moms
programme.desc: Eleanor quickly takes over babysitting duties running Kate's household and Charlie's schedule her way. Now that Kate's hired her, can she actually fire her own mother? Meanwhile, in an attempt to shut down her daughter's wild nature, Anne hires a “mean nanny” who can keep Alice in line, but also threatens to keep Anne in line too. And when Jenny's husband Ian surprises her at work, Jenny's flustered reaction leads Ian to wondering… why does Jenny suddenly love work so much?

programme.title: Workin' Moms
programme.desc: Kate is faced with a veritable “Sophie's choice” when her mother Eleanor pressures Kate to put down her longtime pet Olly in favour of protecting Charlie. Meanwhile, a therapy session with Anne leads Frankie to attempt to re-invigorate her marriage, and Anne on the home front finds "Mean Nanny's" friendly rapport with Alice not only annoying, but also surprisingly enviable.

programme.title: Mr. D
programme.sub-title: The Man with Two Red Shoes
programme.desc: Lisa starts a friendly ‘Teacher of the Month' competition and it's no surprise when Mr. Dwyer wins the first one. Gerry feels slighted and is determined to find a way to earn next month's title. When word gets out that a lurker has been spotted in the neighbourhood, Gerry sets out to catch him. Of course, catching a lurker is no small feat and Gerry must use some rather unconventional tactics if he's to succeed. Meanwhile, Robert has been working on an art installation made up of photos of Xavier's staff and students. Bobbi is upset to find she has seemingly been excluded from the project and confronts him about his unresolved feelings for her. At the same time, an unexpected feud develops between Dwyer and Nisha when they discover that they've been using the same catchphrase. After all, “Every day's a holiday” can only belong to one.

programme.title: Mr. D
programme.desc: Gerry's blown away when he lays eyes on the new hot substitute teacher, Mary. Conveniently forgetting that he's technically married, he vows to woo her. But to his shock and horror, Gerry sees a second hot sub, Shane, who appears to be his fiercest competitor for Mary's affection. Gerry tasks Simon with keep hot sub Shane away from hot sub Mary, until Gerry can lock that down. Simon assures Gerry that he's on it, but finds the mission interfering with his five-month anniversary plans with Nisha. Bobbi has been having trouble with foul-mouthed and disruptive Alex. Taking Dwyer's advice, she sets out to change his attitude through positive reinforcement.

programme.title: Mr. D
programme.desc: Gerry walks in on Trudy and Emma watching a viral video of a bus driver being bullied by students. After learning about a crowdfunding effort that raised money for the poor bus driver, he recruits Simon to help him stage a ‘bullying' incident on the bus, in which he is to be the sad victim. Meanwhile, Bobbi takes a dozen pregnancy tests and finally accepts that she's pregnant. When the tests are discovered, she finds herself roped into Robert's misguided hunt for twelve frightened pregnant young students.. Dwyer has a new lady in his life and seems happier than he's been in a long time. Nisha couldn't be more pleased for him, until she discovers that his new love interest bears a striking resemblance to the sketch composite of the suspect in his late wife's murder case.

programme.title: Son of a Critch
programme.desc: Mark fears being forced to play the cello will make him a social pariah. But when his cello is taken by a gang of bullies, Fox begrudgingly comes to his rescue. Meanwhile, Pop and Sister Rose take a stroll down memory lane when it's revealed they used to be an item.

programme.title: Son of a Critch
programme.desc: When Ritche invites himself to a sleepover, Mark scrambles to hide his family's “eccentric” behaviour. Meanwhile, Mike Sr takes a staunch pro-cucumber stance when the new vegetable buys ad time on VOCM radio.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek

Meanwhile, Anne tries to reign in her sexually explicit nine-year-old daughter. And Jenny reluctantly returns to work where she reconnects with an old friend: her sex drive.

programme.title: Cupids on Beacon Street
programme.desc: A romance book editor shares a house with a self-help coach who needs the space to host romantically themed workshops for Valentine's Day. Starring Britt Irvin (2021)

programme.title: Be Mine
programme.desc: Garden store manager Jack falls for his boss's daughter. Unlucky for him, she is also his new boss. Can Jack win over the heart of love cynic, Kate? (2021)

programme.title: All Things Valentine
programme.desc: Avery is an advice columnist ready to give-up on the prospect love. But will she change her mind when she meets a handsome veterinarian? Sarah Rafferty and Sam Page star. (2016)

programme.title: Be My Valentine
programme.desc: Dan is a widower and single father who has no interest in dating. But will a chance meeting before Valentine's Day change his perspective on life and love? William Baldwin stars. (2012)

programme.title: Valentine's Again
programme.desc: After an unsuccessful Valentine's Day date, Kat's Fairy Godmother tries to teach her lessons on love. Kat must repeat the day until she can find her soulmate (2017)

programme.title: Stratton
programme.desc: A British Special Boat Service commando tracks down an international terrorist cell. Stars Dominic Cooper (2017)

programme.title: Virtual Lies
programme.desc: When a man cheats with someone online, his wife tells him to end things with her.

programme.title: Girlfriend Killer
programme.desc: A businesswoman who creates the perfect marriage proposals for wealthy men, becomes the target of a crazy client's obsession. Starring Barbie Castro (2017)

programme.title: A Friend's Obsession
programme.desc: After moving across the country, a woman befriends an old colleague who will stop at nothing to make her his. Starring Karissa Lee Staples (2018)

programme.title: In Bed With A Killer
programme.desc: A single woman believes she has met the man of her dreams, however he seems to be hiding some very dark secrets. Starring Jennifer Taylor (2019)

programme.title: Beyond the Law
programme.desc: Dan Saxon is an undercover cop who infiltrates a biker gang to nail the scum behind a drug-smuggling operation. In order to maintain the trust of the gang's leader, he must commit ever more dangerous and heinous crimes. Just how far ‘beyond the law' will Saxon go?

programme.title: The Quiet Hour
programme.desc: In the aftermath of an alien invasion, a feisty teenage girl sets out to protect her farm from human scavengers who will stop at nothing in order to survive in a post-apocalyptic world.

programme.title: The Nora Roberts Collection Season 1
programme.desc: A chef moves to a small town in Wyoming after her Boston restaurant is shut down because of a fatal shooting.

programme.title: Nydenion
programme.desc: Over centuries the early colonies have evolved into giant empires. The Sycon Empire is at war with the Confederation of Free Worlds. In the last 75 years, the death toll has risen, Peace is long forgotten and earth is just a legend. The Pilot Rick Walker is hired to tranport a mysterious woman to a secret peace negotiaion. But after an attack they are forced to crash land on a remote planet…

programme.title: Out of the Furnace
programme.desc: When Rodney mysteriously disappears, his older brother takes matters into his own hands to find justice.

programme.title: Hornet's Nest
programme.desc: It's up to police chief Judy Hammer and her deputy to uncover the serial killer terrorizing Charlotte, NC.

programme.title: Beautiful Boy
programme.desc: Bill and Kate's already strained marriage is tested when their college son commits a shocking act of violence.

programme.title: Far From Home
programme.desc: Upon the death of his estranged uncle, an embittered writer returns home to the idyllic San Juan, WA islands.

programme.title: Love On Harbor Island
programme.desc: Interior designer Lily returns home to help her Aunt Maggie run her marina-side bed and breakfast when she meets Marcus, a handsome seaplane pilot whose work delivering rescue dogs helps Lily discover that home really is where the heart is.

programme.title: Love at First Lie
programme.desc: When Sarah Goldman, a lovely young school teacher in Chicago, wants to please her parents, she invents a boyfriend whom she believes will be the man of her mother's dreams. When her parents insist on meeting the man, Sarah hires Bob, an actor, to pretend to be her "beau". The masquerade works flawlessly for a time and brings comic situations, but in the end, their lives are irrevocably changed.

programme.title: The Importance of Being Mike
programme.desc: One of Ali's co-workers, named Mike, takes her dancing - sort of. (S1 E03)

programme.title: Belle and the Beast
programme.desc: Eric Landry is a cold-hearted man that people have nicknamed "the Beast." Years of anger and bitterness have consumed him, turning him into a selfish man. But Belle Watson is the exact opposite. When her father accidentally breaks a valuable work of art at the Landry mansion, Belles agrees to work for Eric in an effort to repay him and save her father's job. She discovers there just might be more to Eric. Will she find the man within the Beast?

programme.title: Finding Love In Mountain View
programme.desc: After learning she's been entrusted to take care of her deceased cousin's children, an architect is torn between focusing on her career and honoring her cousin's wish.

programme.title: Day of the Outlaw
programme.desc: Blaise Starrett is a rancher at odds with homesteaders when outlaws hold up the small town.

programme.title: One-Eyed Jacks
programme.desc: After robbing a Mexican bank, Dad Longworth takes the loot and leaves his partner Rio to be captured but Rio escapes and searches for Dad in California.

programme.title: The Capture
programme.desc: A badly injured fugitive explains to a priest how he came to be in his present predicament.

programme.title: Pancho Villa
programme.desc: A double-cross in an arms deal prompts Mexican revolutionary Pancho Villa to raid a US Army weapons depot in Columbus, New Mexico.

programme.title: Meet The Marsupials
programme.desc: Few countries have a more iconic representative in the animal kingdom than Australia and the marsupial. Marsupials were once found across the planet, but over time they found their way to the outback, leaving Australia as an ark carrying the future of pouch mammals. As varied as they are unusual, marsupials are a weird and wonderful mob of animals who carry their young in a pouch. Whether hopping, climbing or even airborne, marsupials are some of the strangest but most fascinating creatures you're likely to meet.

programme.title: Destination Wild: Wild Chile: Episode 1
programme.desc: This is the story of an awe-inspiring land of extremes. From the cold and fearsome waters of Tierra Del Fuego and the Antarctic Peninsula to the frozen Patagonian steppe, we follow the animals living on the very edge of existence, having to survive is some of the most extreme environments on earth. King Penguins court on the windswept coast leopard seals hunt amongst the ice floes and young pumas take their first steps toward independence is this South American final Frontier.

programme.title: Little Cats
programme.desc: From mysterious lynx to athletic servals and water-bound jungle cats, the little cats of the world are some of the most fascinating and ruthless predators on the planet.

programme.title: Brown Bears Teddy Bears Picnic
programme.desc: If you go down to the woods today a wonderful treat awaits! The home of one of the planet's most loved and characterful animals – the brown bear. Baby bears have a lot to learn about life in the forest, but thankfully all bears know their way around a good picnic.

programme.title: Hannah Goes to Namibia
programme.desc: As soon as she arrives, conservationist Hannah Emde immerses herself in Namibia's wildlife. The first destination of her trip is the world-famous Naankuse Foundation near Windhoek

programme.title: Hannah Goes to Namibia
programme.desc: Hannah runs a health check on two female cheetahs with veterinarian Maaike. She then goes into the wilderness with Naankuse founder Marlice. Together they go in search of the elephant Apollo, which was resettled in the sanctuary. The former "problem" elephant now leads a peaceful life here.

programme.title: Kalahari Meerkats
programme.desc: The Gosa Gang have recently moved to a new home known as Fortress burrow. It is close to the Gosa Dam where a rival family of meerkats live.In the quest for territorial dominance there has been a major meerkat standoff. This has resulted in both gangs losing a member of their tribe.

programme.title: Kalahari Meerkats
programme.desc: Recently Priscilla bought an adopted boy pup from a rival gang to the Gosa Burrow. Unfortunately his acceptance into the Gosa group was far from ideal. His life did not get any easier after this

programme.title: Meet The Marsupials
programme.desc: Few countries have a more iconic representative in the animal kingdom than Australia and the marsupial. Marsupials were once found across the planet, but over time they found their way to the outback, leaving Australia as an ark carrying the future of pouch mammals. As varied as they are unusual, marsupials are a weird and wonderful mob of animals who carry their young in a pouch. Whether hopping, climbing or even airborne, marsupials are some of the strangest but most fascinating creatures you're likely to meet.

programme.title: Caribbean sisters: The Lesser Antilles St. Kitts & Nevis
programme.desc: In the centre of the Caribbean, volcanoes rise steeply from the sea, thus shaping the sister islands of St. Kitts & Nevis. Their slopes, covered in lush rainforests, snow-white, sandy beaches and the surrounding tur-quoise tinted waters provide the ultimate setting for this record-breaking, albeit tiny island paradise: Both islets are the smallest of the Caribbean dwarf states and also rank among the world's ten smallest states. A hot pepper sauce, made of a creative mixture of ginger, garlic, thyme and extraordinarily hot chillies that thrive in the hot and humid climate of Nevis, is simmering on the stove of Violet and Llewellyn's house. Lemmy Pemberton digs up abandoned turtle nests with his bare hands, as he wants to be certain that all of the babies have indeed managed to make it. Members of the Turtle Group catch sea turtles in order to take their measurements and fit them with transmitters. Taxi bus-es are not only the main means of transport on St. Kitts & Nevis, they are also an artistic expression of each driver's personality. Colourfully embellished, each taxi represents island art on wheels.

programme.title: 15th Meridian East
programme.desc: What ideas are people on the 15th meridian east developing to shape the future and leave tomorrow's generations a home worth living in? This consequence leads us to four future designers. From the barren Namib Desert to the glacier worlds of Spitsbergen, Sicily and the Croatian Mediterranean. (S1 E05)

programme.title: 15th Meridian East
programme.desc: The journey leads from the Norwegian Vesterålen to Chad, the Aeolian Islands and the Polish Giant Mountains. As different as the landscapes and cultures may be, all people are united in their love for their children and their desire to give something to tomorrow's generation. (S1 E04)

programme.title: Lions On The Move
programme.desc: Kevin Richardson shares an extraordinary bond with Africa's most fearsome predators. Together with them, he has experienced some real adventures. However, transporting 27 lions and 14 hyenas to a new home presents a different challenge.The lions' new home will be a sanctuary on the edge of Dinokeng, a South African game reserve spanning 18,000 square metres. The huge task ahead includes planning and designing the new enclosures, and securing permits to move the animals. (S1 E01)

programme.title: Lions On The Move
programme.desc: Not only are the animals regularly rotated into new enclosures to prevent repetitive behaviour developing out of boredom, but Kevin also has to practice loading them in and out of the van. Can the reluctant lions and hyenas eventually be persuaded to get on board with the move? (S1 E02)

programme.title: Masai Mara: The Big Hunt
programme.desc: When food supply in the Serengeti dwindles, the Masai Mara is a paradise for predators. As the black wildebeests, gazelles, zebras and antelopes make their yearly trip from the south of the Serengeti to the north, nature's best laid trap, the Mara River in Kenya is waiting ahead. Captivating shots filmed under water show how crocodiles prepare for the Big Hunt while other predators lurk on the banks awaiting their bounty. The biggest problems for the migratory animals are the Mara and the Tarek River, where they have to put their lives at risk to get to the other side. A great number of them die as they jump into the river and break their legs, while others are carried away by the drift or drown. Those who are not victims of the river itself risk falling prey to the crocodiles. We entered this unchartered territory, the crocodile domain by heading under water. Follow these predators in and around their habitat and watch prides of lions map out their game plan. In slow-motion, we show you the final showdown between predator and prey. Will it be a successful hunt or will the hoofed animals persevere?

programme.title: Close up with Hippos
programme.desc: This nature documentary shows the many different sides of the Hippo's lives on one September day in two iconic African locations: the Masai Mara-Nationalpark in Kenya, also the setting for the largest annual animal migration on the planet – one and a half million wildebeests and zebras migrate from the Serengeti to Kenya during this time.

Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become an Astronaut and flies to space to look for Mr. Moon with her friends. // In Rainbow Village, a super frantic Thunderbell is high up in the air, trapped inside a giant bubble. Thunderbell got trapped in a giant bubble in the middle of a bubble bath. In order to find out a way to bring Thunderbell back to earth, Rainbow Ruby turns into a scientist.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Gina accidentally broke Felicia's house, leaving Felicia homeless. programme.title: Rainbow Ruby

Ruby and Choco get their suitcase and as Ruby swings her umbrella, there they are, in front of Rainbow fountain. programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
